content:
# Nanotechnology

**Summary**: The application of nanotechnology to solve problems in various fields, including environmental remediation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] applied carbon nanotube technology for the removal of heavy metals from water.

- [[2012-amer|Amer, 2012]] investigated nanotechnology by incorporating Nano silica into cement slurries to enhance mechanical properties in HPHT environments.

- [[2013-murtaza|Murtaza, 2013]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2014-alao|Alao, 2014]] applied nanotechnology to improve the thermal stability and rheology of surfactants.

- [[2014-jamil|JAMIL, 2014]] investigated the use of MOFs for CO2 adsorption systems.

- [[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015]] utilized metal nanoparticles (Ni, Ce, Fe) as active sites for desulfurization.

- [[2015-thalab|Thalab, 2015]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2015-khan-2|Khan, 2015]] explored nanotechnology to improve oil well cement properties in HPHT conditions.

- [[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]] utilized nanotechnology to develop high-surface-area adsorbents for water treatment.

- [[2016-alhamad|AlHamad, 2016]] applied nanotechnology by utilizing zeolite nanoparticles as EOR agents.

- [[2017-alakbari|Alakbari, 2017]] investigated the use of nanoclay and nanosilica as additives in drilling fluids.

- [[2017-baig|Baig, 2017]] applied nanotechnology to improve the properties of oil-well cement.

- [[2019-salawudeen|Salawudeen, 2019]] utilized graphene-based polymeric nanomaterials for water treatment.

- [[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021]] utilized graphene-based nanostructures for enhanced adsorption capacity.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] ['carbon nanotube synthesis', 'surface functionalization']

- [[2012-amer|Amer, 2012]] investigated nanotechnology by incorporating Nano silica into cement slurries to enhance mechanical properties in HPHT environments.

- [[2013-murtaza|Murtaza, 2013]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2014-alao|Alao, 2014]] applied nanotechnology to improve the thermal stability and rheology of surfactants.

- [[2014-jamil|JAMIL, 2014]] investigated the use of MOFs for CO2 adsorption systems.

- [[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015]] utilized metal nanoparticles (Ni, Ce, Fe) as active sites for desulfurization.

- [[2015-thalab|Thalab, 2015]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2015-khan-2|Khan, 2015]] explored nanotechnology to improve oil well cement properties in HPHT conditions.

- [[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]] utilized nanotechnology to develop high-surface-area adsorbents for water treatment.

- [[2016-alhamad|AlHamad, 2016]] applied nanotechnology by utilizing zeolite nanoparticles as EOR agents.

- [[2017-alakbari|Alakbari, 2017]] investigated the use of nanoclay and nanosilica as additives in drilling fluids.

- [[2017-baig|Baig, 2017]] applied nanotechnology to improve the properties of oil-well cement.

- [[2019-salawudeen|Salawudeen, 2019]] utilized graphene-based polymeric nanomaterials for water treatment.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] ['chemical vapor deposition (CVD)', 'SEM/TEM']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- MWCNTs produced by CVD were confirmed as high-purity materials with a diameter of 20-40 nm. ([[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009, p. 70]])

- Nano silica was found more effective than ordinary silica fume in enhancing compressive strength. ([[2012-amer|Amer, 2012, p. 36]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2013-murtaza|Murtaza, 2013]])

- CNT-included samples showed superior thermal endurance compared to standard formulations. ([[2014-alao|Alao, 2014, p. 18]])

- Mg-MOF-74 showed distinct adsorption characteristics compared to traditional adsorbents like activated carbon and zeolite 13X. ([[2014-jamil|JAMIL, 2014, p. 68]])

- Synthesized AC loaded with metals showed significant improvement in the adsorption of the refractory sulfur compounds. ([[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015, p. 19]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2015-thalab|Thalab, 2015]])

- Nanoparticles provide enhanced mechanical, optical, transport, and magnetic properties due to high surface area-to-volume ratios. ([[2015-khan-2|Khan, 2015, p. 45]])

- Nanoparticles offer unique properties like surface plasmon resonance and high reactivity. ([[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016, p. 51]])

- Nanoparticles smaller than 100 nm can easily penetrate through porous media due to their size relative to pore throats. ([[2016-alhamad|AlHamad, 2016, p. 18]])

- Nanosilica was found to improve gel strength at 200 , while nanoclay did not provide similar benefits for rheology. ([[2017-alakbari|Alakbari, 2017, p. 11]])

- Nano zeolite can serve as an effective additive for Oil-well cement as it enhances early compressive strength with improvement in durability properties. ([[2017-baig|Baig, 2017, p. 20]])

- GPDADMAC and GPHM were successfully synthesized and characterized as effective adsorbents. ([[2019-salawudeen|Salawudeen, 2019, p. 15]])

- Modified graphene (PG) showed a maximum adsorption capacity of 161.29 mg/g, significantly higher than other tested variants. ([[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021, p. 69]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] Optimizing the surface chemistry of nanotubes for specific ions.
